title: Interface Definition
description: Schema for interface definitions read by SimpleInterfaceReader

title.description: The title of the interface, rendered as a MiniMessage component

content_mask.description: The content mask for paginated interfaces

pattern.description: Layout pattern defining the inventory grid. Each string represents a row; each character maps to an item definition. Spaces represent empty slots.

on_open.description: Actions executed when the interface is opened

on_close.description: Actions executed when the interface is closed

^.$.description: Item definition mapped to a single character used in the pattern

text.description: A MiniMessage text string, or an object with a 'content' field and additional tag resolver entries

additionalProperties.description: Tag resolver value for a placeholder used in the content

item_definition.description: Defines an item to display in a slot

item.description: The item identifier, e.g. 'minecraft:diamond' (parsed by Bukkit's ItemFactory)

amount.description: An arithmetic expression for the item amount. Supports variables like 'row', 'column', 'index' and operators

name.description: The display name of the item, rendered as a MiniMessage component

lore.description: The lore lines of the item, each rendered as a MiniMessage component

hide_tooltip.description: Whether to hide the item's tooltip

profile.description: A player name or Base64-encoded texture value for player head items

click_actions.description: Actions executed when the item is clicked. Each entry can combine conditions and actions

click_action_entry.description: A click action entry combining optional conditions with actions. All conditions must be met for the actions to execute

click_type.description: Required click type condition. Prefix with '!' to negate

permission.description: Permission node the player must have for the actions to execute

no_permission.description: Permission node the player must NOT have for the actions to execute

send_message.description: Send a private MiniMessage message to the player. Supports the <player> placeholder

broadcast.description: Broadcast a MiniMessage message to all online players. Supports the <player> placeholder

run_command.description: Command to execute as the player. Supports the <player> placeholder

run_console_command.description: Command to execute as the console. Supports the <player> placeholder

play_sound.description: Play a sound to the player

transfer.description: Transfer the player to another server in host:port format

connect.description: Connect the player to a BungeeCord/Velocity proxy server by name

close_interface.description: Close the player's current inventory. Takes no arguments

action_entry.description: An action entry for on_open/on_close events. Combines optional conditions with actions

permission.description: Permission node the player must have for the actions to execute

no_permission.description: Permission node the player must NOT have for the actions to execute

send_message.description: Send a private MiniMessage message to the player. Supports the <player> placeholder

broadcast.description: Broadcast a MiniMessage message to all online players. Supports the <player> placeholder

run_command.description: Command to execute as the player. Supports the <player> placeholder

run_console_command.description: Command to execute as the console. Supports the <player> placeholder

play_sound.description: Play a sound to the player

transfer.description: Transfer the player to another server in host:port format

connect.description: Connect the player to a BungeeCord/Velocity proxy server by name

close_interface.description: Close the player's current inventory. Takes no arguments

sound.description: Sound definition to play for a player
